subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and I'm glad you're following up.

We'd love to set up a 30-minute call. Could you propose a few time slots next week that work for you? We'll confirm whichever fits best on our end.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share those. What I can do is help facilitate a senior-level technical discussion once we've had our initial call and aligned on the collaboration scope. That way we can make sure the right people are involved from the start.

Looking forward to reconnecting!

Best regards
